rulings.Case Title: VIRGIL HOTT et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 7, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for apportionment proceeding and for an order to distribute settlement funds is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)
